name: Talked to insurance adjuster already after site injury—did I mess up?
description: Maybe; lawyer reviews, halts further talks.

mainEntity.name: Talked to insurance adjuster already after site injury—did I mess up?

acceptedAnswer.text: Maybe; lawyer reviews, halts further talks.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Possibly; recorded statements can be twisted—stop talking without lawyer.** Common mistake[1]. **Key factors:** 1. Lowball offers early. 2. Admissions used against. 3. Right to silence. 4. Consult now. Lawyer reviews what said, counters with evidence.
